title: Giant Foil Number 1 Balloon - 86 cm - Matte White
features: Number balloon measures 86 cm when fully inflated (ships flat)
Can be filled with helium or air via hand pump, and is self-sealing
Ideal for a 1st birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for any age
Combine with other white party supplies from Unique Party

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning: Choking Hazard. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts. Warning: Do not use near overhead powerlines or during thunderstorms. Caution: Not intended for release. Dispose of properly. Never use metallic ribbon with balloon. This balloon may conduct electricity. Misuse can cause personal injury. Attach a non-metallic ribbon and balloon weight.
